# Municipal Snow Removal Services — Montréal Borough

**Procurement reference:** VILLE-MTL-SNOW-2026-014  
**Issuing authority:** Arrondissement Rosemont–La Petite-Patrie, Province of Québec, Canada  
**Publication date:** 2026-01-10  
**Submission deadline:** 2026-03-02 16:00 EST  

## Scope

Winter maintenance contract for mechanical snow removal and sidewalk salting on designated arterial roads within the borough boundaries. Contractors must operate heavy municipal-grade equipment and maintain 24/7 on-call crews between November and April.

## Eligibility

Open **only** to legal entities registered in **Québec** with valid RBQ licences for snow removal (Subclass 5.2). **Non-profit organisations are not eligible.** Consortium bids are accepted provided the lead firm meets residency requirements.

## Geographic restriction

All work shall be performed **within the City of Montréal**. No activities outside Canada apply.

## Budget

Estimated annual contract value CAD $4.2M–$4.8M.

## Submission

Proposals must be submitted via the **SEAO** electronic tendering portal (Québec government). Late submissions will not be accepted.

---

This notice does **not** relate to Ethiopia, East Africa, agriculture, health electrification, off-grid energy, SME finance, BDS, World Bank–style development programmes, or comparable international development consulting.
